Title: TASK-01 ADR and queue migration plan
Description: ADR for queue workers finalized: contract, job schema, migration plan and rollback steps prepared.
Acceptance_Criteria: ADR document in docs/adr/ accepted; migration checklist present; alembic upgrade/rollback validated locally

Title: TASK-02 Queue DAO and services
Description: DAO for processing jobs implemented; services for enqueue/claim/update/requeue and unit tests added. Atomic operations and basic error handling ensured.
Acceptance_Criteria: Unit tests for DAO (enqueue, claim, update, requeue) pass; migration applied; smoke end-to-end enqueue→worker→complete

Title: TASK-03 DI worker & Whisper service
Description: Finalize DI worker and long-lived FastAPI whisper service: Dockerfiles, entrypoints, network/WG glue, env handling and transcribe_client integration.
Acceptance_Criteria: Docker images build; sample audio → transcript works; worker processes job and stores transcript

Title: TASK-04 Transcriber pipeline (v4)
Description: Polish transcriber_v4: chunking, retries, formatting via OpenRouter/OpenAI, fallback behavior on LLM errors and tests for chunking/formatting.
Acceptance_Criteria: Chunking and formatting unit tests pass; 10-min sample produces formatted transcript; fallbacks validated

Title: TASK-05 Bot refactor: handlers & logging
Description: Complete refactor of bot handlers, callbacks, commands; integrate logging_utils, processing_guard, update_dedupe and large file downloader changes. Add smoke tests for main flows.
Files: transkribator_modules/bot/handlers.py; callbacks.py; commands.py; logging_utils.py; processing_guard.py; update_dedupe.py; utils/large_file_downloader.py
Acceptance_Criteria: Core bot flows (start, upload media, buy plan, personal cabinet) work in dev compose; handler tests/smoke pass

Title: TASK-06 Payments & webhooks (Yukassa)
Description: Stabilize Yukassa integration: webhook handlers, payment monitoring, sandbox testing and logging for payment flows.
Acceptance_Criteria: Sandbox payment scenario completes; webhook validation and DB updates verified; monitoring emits events

Title: TASK-07 Docker & compose improvements
Description: Fix and optimize Dockerfiles and docker-compose configurations; ensure reproducible builds, small images and no secret leakage to images.
Acceptance_Criteria: docker compose build & up succeed for dev stack; no secrets in built images; build times reasonable

Title: TASK-08 Tools & minimal_app stabilization
Description: Polish developer tools and minimal_app pipeline used for local testing and benchmarks; update READMEs and usage scripts.
Acceptance_Criteria: minimal_app end-to-end run completes for a sample audio; tool README updated; scripts usable by devs

Title: TASK-09 Tests & CI stabilization
Description: Stabilize unit and integration tests, mock external services where needed, and configure CI (pytest, lint, black/isort checks).
Acceptance_Criteria: CI pipeline runs tests and linters; flaky external tests are mocked or flagged; local pytest passes

Title: TASK-10 Repo cleanup: large files & policy
Description: Remove or archive large binary artifacts (wheelhouse, exports, DB dumps); update .gitignore; prepare plan for history rewrite if required.
Acceptance_Criteria: Large binaries removed from future commits; .gitignore updated; archival location documented; plan for history rewrite prepared if needed

Title: TASK-11 Buffer: bugfix & polish
Description: Buffer time for bug fixes, integration polish, post-integration adjustments and final smoke tests before release.
Acceptance_Criteria: Critical bugs fixed; smoke tests green; release checklist completed
